The '''''Draisini''''' was a [[Mining Guild/Legends|Mining Guild]] [[Xiytiar-class heavy transport/Legends|''Xiytiar''-class heavy transport]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Forma]]. It was hit by pirates under [[Sol Mon]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 1|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 1]] {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
